options.content:
# WARNING

This dashboard does not take into account the user’s role and related permissions and it is intended for use by an administrator on an on-premise non multi-tenant installation of NetEye.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS down 
FROM icinga_objects AS ho
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = ho.object_id AND ho.is_active = 1 AND ho.objecttype_id = 1
INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = ho.object_id
-- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = ho.object_id 
-- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = ho.object_id 
WHERE 
	-- cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
	-- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})
	-- AND ho.is_active = '1'
	ho.is_active = '1'
	AND
	hs.current_state = '1'
	AND 
	(hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth) = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM icinga_objects AS ho
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = ho.object_id AND ho.is_active = 1 AND ho.objecttype_id = 1
INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = ho.object_id
-- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = ho.object_id 
-- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = ho.object_id 
WHERE 
	-- cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
	-- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})
	-- AND
	ho.is_active = '1'
	AND hs.current_state = '1' 
	AND (hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth) > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 2
   AND 	ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth = 0
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 2
   AND (ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth + COALESCE(hs.current_state, 0)) > 0 
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 1
   AND ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth = 0
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 1
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})
   AND (ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth + COALESCE(hs.current_state, 0)) > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 3
   AND 	ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth = 0
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt 
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state = 3
   -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
   -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})
   AND (ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth + COALESCE(hs.current_state, 0)) > 0

value.title: host details on NetEye Web Interface

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
   o.name1 AS host_name,
   h.address AS 'ip address',
   hs.current_state AS 'host_state',
   convert_tz(hs.last_state_change, 'Europe/Rome','Etc/UTC') AS host_last_state_change,
   CONCAT(
	  TIMESTAMPDIFF(day,hs.last_state_change,now()) , ' d ',
	  MOD( TIMESTAMPDIFF(hour,hs.last_state_change,now()), 24), ' h ',
	  MOD( TIMESTAMPDIFF(minute,hs.last_state_change,now()), 60), ' m '
	) as duration,
   hs.output AS 'output',
   IF(hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged=0, 'Not acknowledged', 'Acknowledged') AS 'acknowledged',
   IF(hs.scheduled_downtime_depth=0, 'Not in Downtime', 'In Downtime') AS 'in downtime',
   IF((hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth) > 0, 'Handled', 'Not handled') AS 'Handled'
FROM
   icinga_hoststatus hs
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects o ON hs.host_object_id = o.object_id AND hs.instance_id = o.instance_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts h ON hs.host_object_id = h.host_object_id AND hs.instance_id = h.instance_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = o.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE
   o.is_active = 1
   AND 
    CASE
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'Handled' THEN 
		hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth > 0
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'Not Handled' THEN 
		hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth = 0
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'All' THEN 
		hs.problem_has_been_acknowledged + hs.scheduled_downtime_depth >= 0
	END  
  AND hs.current_state > 0
  -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
  -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})

value.title: host details on NetEye Web Interface
service details on NetEye Web Interface

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
   os.name1 AS host_name,
   h.address AS host_address,
   os.name2 AS service_description,
   ss.current_state AS service_state,
   -- ss.last_state_change AS service_last_state_change,
   convert_tz(ss.last_state_change, 'Europe/Rome','Etc/UTC') AS 'State time',
   CONCAT(
	TIMESTAMPDIFF(day,ss.last_state_change,now()) , ' d ',
	MOD( TIMESTAMPDIFF(hour,ss.last_state_change,now()), 24), ' h ',
	MOD( TIMESTAMPDIFF(minute,ss.last_state_change,now()), 60), ' m '
	) as duration,
   if(length(ss.output) > 80, concat(left(ss.output, 80),'    (...)'), ss.output) as service_output,
   IF(ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged=0, 'Not acknowledged', 'Acknowledged') AS service_acknowledged,
   IF(ss.scheduled_downtime_depth=0, 'Not in Downtime', 'In Downtime') AS service_in_downtime,
   IF((ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth) > 0, 'Handled', 'Not handled') AS 'Handled'
FROM
   icinga_services s
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects os ON s.service_object_id = os.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_objects oh ON s.host_object_id = oh.object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_hoststatus AS hs ON hs.host_object_id = s.host_object_id
   INNER JOIN icinga_servicestatus AS ss ON ss.service_object_id =os.object_id 
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_lista ON cv_lista.object_id = oh.object_id
   -- INNER JOIN icinga_customvariables cv_cliente ON cv_cliente.object_id = oh.object_id
WHERE
   os.is_active = 1
   AND oh.is_active = 1
   AND ss.current_state IN ($service_state)
   AND
   CASE
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'Handled' THEN 
		ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth > 0
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'Not Handled' THEN 
		ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth = 0
	WHEN '${problem_handled}' = 'All' THEN 
	  ss.problem_has_been_acknowledged + ss.scheduled_downtime_depth >= 0
	END   
  -- AND cv_lista.varname = 'lista' and cv_lista.varvalue IN(${lista}) 
  -- AND cv_cliente.varname = 'cliente' AND cv_cliente.varvalue IN(${clienti})
ORDER BY ss.last_state_change DESC
